def negative_over_abstracted_wrapper():
    rule_id = "over_abstracted_wrapper"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Ceremonial wrapper-style or tiny data-container classes that add little beyond storing constructor state."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
